message:
fix(identity): use composite tmux pane key to prevent collisions in multi-session setups

In multi-session tmux setups, two agents in different sessions can share
the same bare pane ID (e.g., %3), causing identity file collisions.

Now uses `session_name:window_index:pane_index` as the pane key (obtained
via `tmux display-message`), falling back to bare `$TMUX_PANE` when the
composite is unavailable. Legacy bare-pane-ID identity files are still
checked as fallback during resolution for backwards compatibility.

Closes #41

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
